name: Unsupported factual claim
control: Require source citation or explicit uncertainty.

name: Unauthorized tool action
control: Block action and route to human approval.

name: Prompt injection from document
control: Isolate retrieved content from system instructions and test adversarial examples.

name: High-risk decision without approval
control: Enforce approval gates by autonomy and risk level.

name: Conflicting source handling failure
control: Define source precedence and conflict escalation.

name: Stale knowledge usage
control: Track freshness and require refresh policy.

name: No measurable business value
control: Define value metric and baseline before pilot.
